_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in using data mapping tools.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in operating a data catalog platform, including configuring connectors, reviewing harvested metadata, curating business context, and managing access.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-S-001 (DA, cosine: 0.603), OP-S-009 (OP, cosine: 0.595).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.2/10 (raw 0.623). Shared vocabulary: [data, skill]. DCWF-only terms [mapping, tools, using] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, business, catalog, configuring, connectors, context] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.901 (P=0.936, R=0.868). P exceeds R by 0.068 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.1%). "Skill in using data mapping tools." and "Skill in operating a data catalog platform, including configuring connectors, re" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.640 ≈ STS 0.623 (gap 0.018). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [data, skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.6%. Shared tokens: [data, skill]. DCWF-only: [mapping, tools, using]. WIDAI-only: [access, business, catalog, configuring, connectors, context].
